verdict: ARTEFACT CONFIRMED — the parts clear (0 mm³) while their convex proxies collide
guard: Suppression is scoped to cross-class pairs between NAMED intended-contact classes (mech = pin/bore ring-of-wedges; seat = lid-on-box seating + floor + flange). The TRAVEL class is never suppressed: travel is measured on base↔mover SEAT-class contacts, which stay live at every angle — that is the path a real lid-vs-box interference takes, and it is exactly what fires at 0.63 mm in the no-stop fold-over. See the LIMITATION note in REVIEW.md.
